since_last: 44% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.26%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 44% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -0.92% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 44% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.26%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.26%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +12.72%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.72%, SPCX +8.64%, TLN +6.11%, ASML +4.38%, AMAT +4.23%. Laggards: SNAP -10.51%, SMR -6.39%, CRNC -5.49%, OKLO -5.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +8.64% at $209.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +8.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
